name: What evidence do I need to prove my firm was harmed by poor AI visibility?
description: Analytics drops, AI screenshots, lead logs.[3][6]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need to prove my firm was harmed by poor AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Analytics drops, AI screenshots, lead logs.[3][6]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Document lost leads via Google Analytics traffic drops and AI query tests showing competitors cited.**[3] Compare pre/post-AI rankings and client inquiries.[6] **Key factors:** 1. Screenshots of AI responses excluding you. 2. Revenue tied to organic search. 3. Expert testimony on GEO standards. **Gather 6 months data, consult antitrust if platforms bias against small firms; rare lawsuits but builds case.**[1] Track diligently.[3]
